name: Anima Commander
description: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by .
rawDescription: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by @PlayerHealth@.

name: Apotheotic Forge
description:
Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.
rawDescription:
Choose 1 of 4 Divine Artifacts.

Artifacts are more powerful items with a unique effect.

name: Backline Blueprint
description: Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.
rawDescription: Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.

name: Bonk!
description: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.
rawDescription: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target Ability that gets stronger with each kill.

name: Booster Pack
description:
Gain  gold of random champions. (At least one -cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)
rawDescription:
Gain @TotalValue@ gold of random champions. (At least one @GuaranteedCost@-cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

name: Booster Pack+
description:
Gain  gold of random champions. (At least one -cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)
rawDescription:
Gain @TotalValue@ gold of random champions. (At least one @GuaranteedCost@-cost guaranteed!)

(Each champion has a small chance of being holographic!)

name: Charge Transfer I
description: Your team gains Damage Amp. of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.
rawDescription: Your team gains @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp. @OverkillPercent*100@% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

name: Charge Transfer II
description: Your team gains Damage Amp. of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.
rawDescription: Your team gains @DamageAmp@% Damage Amp. @OverkillPercent*100@% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

name: Cognitive Overload
description: Gain  gold,  2-star 1-cost champion,  2-cost champion,  3-cost champions,  XP, and  Shop reroll.
rawDescription: Gain @Gold@ gold, @OneCostCount@ 2-star 1-cost champion, @TwoCostCount@ 2-cost champion, @ThreeCostCount@ 3-cost champions, @XP@ XP, and @FreeRolls@ Shop reroll.

name: Cognitive Tax
description: Gain  gold and  XP.
rawDescription: Gain @Gold@ gold and @XP@ XP.

name: Cognitive Tax+
description: Gain  gold and  XP.
rawDescription: Gain @Gold@ gold and @XP@ XP.

name: Concentration
description: Conduit Abilities last to longer, depending on the Ability. Gain a Zoe and a Mordekaiser.
rawDescription: Conduit Abilities last @PowerMin@% to @PowerMax@% longer, depending on the Ability. Gain a Zoe and a Mordekaiser.

name: Contract Killer
description: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.
rawDescription: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke becomes an Attack Fighter, generates gold on team takedown, and gains a reset on-kill Ability.

name: Cosmic Restart
description: Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain  random Emblems and  free Shop rerolls.
rawDescription: Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain @Emblems@ random Emblems and @Rerolls@ free Shop rerolls.

name: Divine Amendment
description:
Arbiters add a second effect to their law.
Gain a Leona and a Zoe.
rawDescription:
Arbiters add a second effect to their law.
Gain a Leona and a Zoe.

name: Expedition
description: At the start of every round, lose the champion in the rightmost bench slot. After losing  gold of champions in this way, gain a powerful reward. Gain a 3-cost champion now. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Expedition_Tooltip@
rawDescription: At the start of every round, lose the champion in the rightmost bench slot. After losing @CashoutCost@ gold of champions in this way, gain a powerful reward. Gain a 3-cost champion now. @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_Expedition_Tooltip@

name: Feeling Lucky
description:
Gain  gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain  more gold.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_FeelingLucky_Tooltip@
rawDescription:
Gain @BaseGold@ gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain @GoldForHeads@ more gold.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_FeelingLucky_Tooltip@

name: Frontline Foundation
description: Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.
rawDescription: Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an Emblem that matches their last-listed trait.

name: Golden Gamble
description:
Gain  gold and flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain  Completed item anvils.

@TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Augment_GoldenGamble_Tooltip@

name: Group Hug I
description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies  Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.
rawDescription: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

name: Group Hug II
description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies  Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.
rawDescription: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies @Resists@ Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

name: Heart of the Swarm
description:
All 3-star champions now count towards Swarmling power. At level , while fielding  unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon the Apex Primordian. Gain a Briar, Bel'veth, and 2-star Rek'sai.

Unique 3-Star Champions Fielded: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / 

Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ /
rawDescription:
All 3-star champions now count towards Swarmling power. At level @LevelRequirement@, while fielding @Num3StarUnits@ unique 3-star champions, Primordians summon the Apex Primordian. Gain a Briar, Bel'veth, and 2-star Rek'sai.

Unique 3-Star Champions Fielded: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalStarredUnits@ / @Num3StarUnits@

Levels: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_PrimordianPrismaticAugment_TotalLevel@ / @LevelRequirement@

name: Heat Death
description: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.
rawDescription: Gain a Mordekaiser. Your strongest Mordkaiser becomes a Magic Fighter with a slowly growing aura that deals damage over time.

name: Invader Zed
description:
Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage -, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.

Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.
rawDescription:
Gain a Spear of Shojin. On Stage @StageNum@-@RoundNum@, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops.

Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

name: Kick Start
description: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and  gold.
rawDescription: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and @Gold@ gold.

name: Loot Singularity
description:
When the Black Hole consumes enemies, it turns them into space matter. After acquiring enough, the Black Hole turns it into loot! Gain a Cho'gath and a Lissandra.

Space matter and loot quality increase each time. Gain // space matter depending on Dark Star breakpoint.

Space Matter: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_CurrentStacks@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_StacksToNextCashout@
rawDescription:
When the Black Hole consumes enemies, it turns them into space matter. After acquiring enough, the Black Hole turns it into loot! Gain a Cho'gath and a Lissandra.

Space matter and loot quality increase each time. Gain @TwoPiecePoints@/@FourPiecePoints@/@SixPiecePoints@ space matter depending on Dark Star breakpoint.

Space Matter: @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_CurrentStacks@ / @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT17_Augment_DarkStar_WhiteHole_StacksToNextCashout@

name: May the Fours Be With You
description: Your 4-cost champions and Jhin gain  Health and Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.
rawDescription: Your 4-cost champions and Jhin gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.

name: Misfits
Money Hungry
description: Gain  gold now, then  gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.
rawDescription: Gain @InstantGold@ gold now, then @StageGold@ gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

name: Reach for the Stars
description: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.
rawDescription: Gain a Jax. Your strongest Jax becomes a Magic Fighter that deal bonus magic damage on attack and gains stacking Attack Speed on cast.

name: Self Destruct
description: Gain a Gragas. Your strongest Gragas becomes a Magic Fighter with a massive explosion, but also damages himself.
rawDescription: Gain a Gragas. Your strongest Gragas becomes a Magic Fighter with a massive explosion, but also damages himself.

name: Shieldmaiden
description: Gain a Leona. Your strongest Leona becomes an Attack Fighter that dashes through enemies to deal physical damage, stunning the first target hit.
rawDescription: Gain a Leona. Your strongest Leona becomes an Attack Fighter that dashes through enemies to deal physical damage, stunning the first target hit.

name: Side Effects
description: When an ally is healed, they deal of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every  seconds, allies heal for of their max Health.
rawDescription: When an ally is healed, they deal @HealConversionPct*100@% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every @HealInterval@ seconds, allies heal for @HealPct*100@% of their max Health.

name: Size Matters
description: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion starts combat with more than  max Health, gain a Warmog's Armor.
rawDescription: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion starts combat with more than @HealthRequired@ max Health, gain a Warmog's Armor.

name: Stellar Combo
description: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.
rawDescription: Gain an Aatrox. Your strongest Aatrox becomes an Attack Fighter with an ability that swaps between three different strikes.

name: Termeepnal Velocity
description: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.
rawDescription: Gain a Poppy. Your strongest Poppy becomes a ranged Attack Caster that flings a high-velocity Meep at her target.

name: The Big Bang
description: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.
rawDescription: Gain a Meepsie. Your strongest Meepsie becomes a Magic Fighter that leaps to a nearby hex to deal damage in a large radius.

name: The Tower
description: Gain a giant Training Dummy with increased Health (increases with Stage). Every  seconds, it zaps the  nearest enemies dealing max Health true damage.
rawDescription: Gain a giant Training Dummy with increased Health (increases with Stage). Every @ZapInterval@ seconds, it zaps the @ZapCount@ nearest enemies dealing @MaxHealthPct*100@% max Health true damage.

name: Timestream
description:
Timebreakers gain  Health and Attack Speed every time you reroll (including free rerolls). Gain an Ezreal and a Pantheon.

(Health: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_HP@, Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_AS*100@%)
rawDescription:
Timebreakers gain @Health@ Health and @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed every time you reroll (including free rerolls). Gain an Ezreal and a Pantheon.

(Health: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_HP@, Attack Speed: @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT17_Augment_Timebreaker_Timestream_AS*100@%)

name: Tour of the Galaxy
description: Voyagers gain  Health, Attack Damage, and Ability Power, increased by each time you fight a new player. You prefer to fight players you haven't fought recently. Gain a Pyke and a Meepsie.
rawDescription: Voyagers gain @HP@ Health, @AD*100@% Attack Damage, and @AP@% Ability Power, increased by @IncPercent*100@% each time you fight a new player. You prefer to fight players you haven't fought recently. Gain a Pyke and a Meepsie.
